description_long: This is a three-wheeled motorized tricycle with a robust, angular body and a low-slung profile. The front features a single large wheel with a protective fender and a transparent windscreen above the handlebars. The seating area is a deep, bucket-style seat upholstered in a reddish-brown material, designed for a single rider. The rear section is supported by two large wheels, each with pronounced fenders, and a prominent exhaust pipe extends from the back, suggesting a motorized drive. The frame appears to be constructed from metal with some plastic or composite panels, and the wheels have a distinctive, modern spoke design. The overall color scheme is a mix of black, dark green, and reddish-brown, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged, motorized tricycle with a single front wheel, two large rear wheels, a bucket seat, and a prominent rear exhaust. Its body is finished in black, green, and reddish-brown tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bucket seat, single front wheel with fender, and the two large rear wheels with a visible exhaust pipe.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dual rear wheels, central exhaust pipe, and the back of the seat and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the seat, front wheel, and rear wheels, with the exhaust pipe visible on the left.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the single front wheel, windscreen, and the handlebar area.
